surface_verification.justification: Docs-only SSoT reconciliation: docs/hooks-and-pipeline.md (pure documentation) + F6.md skill-reference staging prose. No startable runtime surface; correctness verified by the doc-drift suite (test_hooks_json_wrapper, test_churn_merge_doc_sync, test_artifact_path_canon) + empirical probes of the 12 shipped hooks.json and the 4 triage emitters.

behaviors.behavior: F4: the Hooks Registry uses generate_handoff_on_stop.py (real file) with correct counts/order (phase-quality wired into 11 of 12; all 12 have a Stop hook; order list = 10 incl. adopt)
behaviors.evidence: empirical probe extracted all 12 Stop chains (11 wire audit_phase_quality_on_stop; run keeps a 4-hook Stop chain; adopt runs audit->handoff); grep confirms 0 hyphenated 'generate-handoff.py' remain; doc-drift suite (test_branch_integration_doc, test_bloat_baseline) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: F3/F4: registry matcher cells use the string form ('Bash', 'Write|Edit'), not the object form {tools:[...]}
